features.name: genvar loop with offset indexing on unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a genvar for-loop that assigns unpacked array elements using offset indexing (nn+1) where the loop covers all but the first element

features.name: 2D unpacked array dimensioned by clog2 localparam
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array where one dimension uses a localparam calculated from $clog2

features.name: unoptflat lint pragma around signal declaration
features.description: Code should include lint pragmas (lint_off/lint_on UNOPTFLAT) wrapping a signal declaration to suppress false positives
